tool_args.label: ADA station list supports 23 stations since 2020 count
tool_args.raw_text: 23 stations completed since 2020 and 6 stations to be completed by the end of the year; ADA Projects Completed Since 2020 / To Be Completed By End of Year station list

payload.description: The source map gives the aggregate ADA station counts and the station list in the same evidence block; the list-style claim supports the aggregate count claim.
